clearDepth.description: Vertical depth of the influence zone below the footing or slab in feet.

slopeRatio.description: Horizontal to vertical slope ratio used to expand the zone footprint.

verticalOffset.description: Offset applied above the bottom of the footing or slab before expanding the zone.

transparency.description: Transparency percentage applied to the generated DirectShape geometry.

includeFootings.description: Whether to automatically include all structural foundations in the active document.

promptForSlabs.description: Whether to prompt the user to manually select slabs/floors after the dialog closes.
